text: Upon entering this modern, airy space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean lines and industrial ceiling evoke the spirit of possibility and innovation. Passing through the glass doors into the vibrant R&D exhibit, the engaging displays invite contemplation. The words about confusion and clarity resonate with me, making me ponder how easily perception shifts. I feel at once slightly disoriented, yet inspired—a fitting paradox for a place devoted to exploration and discovery.
